zh.lifeSummary: Mary Cooke於1492年10月30日出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。她與John Wheeler在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 尼古拉斯 高爾 艾比 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 奧拉福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1562年10月18日在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年69歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 埃德蒙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Cooke于1492年10月30日出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。她与John Wheeler在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 尼古拉斯 高爾 艾比 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 奧拉福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1562年10月18日在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年69岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 埃德蒙。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Cooke was born on 30 October 1492, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. She married John Wheeler in London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 October 1562, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Salisbury St Edmund, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Cookeは1492年10月30日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた。イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ニチオラス コール アビー ウィス スト ニチオラス オラブでJohn Wheelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1562年10月18日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー スト エドムンドにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 닉홀아스 콜 애브브이 위스 스트 닉홀아스 올레이브
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Cooke(은)는 1492년 10월 30일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 닉홀아스 콜 애브브이 위스 스트 닉홀아스 올레이브에서 John Wheeler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1562년 10월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 스트 에드먼드에 묻혔다.

pt.30 October 1492–18 October 1562: 30 de outubro de 1492–18 de outubro de 1562
pt.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Mary Cooke nasceu em 30 de outubro de 1492, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Wheeler em London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1562, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury St Edmund, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: лондон ст ничолас кол эбби вит ст ничолас олав, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Mary Cooke родилась 30 октября 1492 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wheeler в местности лондон ст ничолас кол эбби вит ст ничолас олав, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 октября 1562 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури ст эдмунд, уилцхир, Англия.
